allies.rationale_text: Resilience supports desirable-difficulties by helping learners treat discomfort as expected strain rather than as a signal to retreat from the growth process.
allies.source_quote: The model aligns with building resilience, which involves adapting to stressful situations.

allies.rationale_text: Deliberate-practice makes desirable-difficulties operational by turning productive challenge into structured reps that build durable transfer instead of shallow fluency.
allies.source_quote: To learn hard things quickly, one must focus intensely without distraction.

antagonists.rationale_text: Simplification becomes a drag on desirable-difficulties when reducing friction too far preserves comfort but strips away the effort needed for durable learning.
antagonists.source_quote: Most useful when fluency would otherwise be mistaken for mastery.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Desirable-difficulties conflicts with simplification when the pursuit of productive struggle prevents adoption of genuinely simpler approaches that would achieve the same learning with less friction.
structured_tensions.source_quote: desirable-difficulties conflicts with simplification (simplification) when the pursuit of productive struggle prevents adoption of genuinely simpler approaches that would achieve the same learning with less friction.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Desirable-difficulties conflicts with cognitive-load-theory when difficulty exceeds working memory capacity, converting a desirable challenge into unproductive overload.
structured_tensions.source_quote: desirable-difficulties conflicts with cognitive-load-theory (cognitive load theory) when difficulty exceeds working memory capacity, converting a desirable challenge into unproductive overload.

curation_notes.summary: The source is strongest on productive challenge, resilience, and disciplined practice, so the file stays sparse rather than forcing weak first-order antagonists.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broader anti-convenience or anti-distraction relation sprawl because the canonical target surface is cleaner around resilience and deliberate-practice.
open_questions: The simplification antagonist is source-real in spirit but remains a reviewed normalization because the raw tension is expressed more as anti-false-fluency than as a direct model pair.
